requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 220–230 V / 50 Hz / Type C/F (SM / ATIC)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——220–230V / 50Hz / C/F型插头（SM / ATIC）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——220–230V / 50Hz / C/F型插頭（SM / ATIC）

summary.en: Moldova operates on 220–230 V AC / 50 Hz with Type C and Type F (Schuko) sockets, consistent with European mains infrastructure. Electrical safety for wireless and IoT devices (including power supplies and chargers) must conform to SM standards mirroring IEC 62368-1 (audio/video, information and communication technology equipment — safety). The DS must cover electrical safety in addition to radio and EMC requirements. ATIC enforces electrical safety under Law 235/2011. CCC-only electrical safety evidence (based on GB 4943.1) is not accepted.
summary.zh: 摩尔多瓦采用220–230V交流电/50Hz，使用C型和F型（Schuko）插座，与欧洲主电网基础设施一致。无线及物联网设备（包括电源适配器和充电器）的电气安全须符合镜像IEC 62368-1的SM标准（音视频、信息和通信技术设备——安全性）。DS须在无线电及电磁兼容要求之外同时涵盖电气安全。ATIC依据《第235/2011号法》执行电气安全管理。仅有CCC电气安全证明（基于GB 4943.1）不被接受。
summary.zht: 摩爾多瓦採用220–230V交流電/50Hz，使用C型和F型（Schuko）插座，與歐洲主電網基礎設施一致。無線及物聯網裝置（包括電源適配器和充電器）的電氣安全須符合鏡像IEC 62368-1的SM標準（音視頻、資訊和通訊技術設備——安全性）。DS須在無線電及電磁相容要求之外同時涵蓋電氣安全。ATIC依據《第235/2011號法》執行電氣安全管理。僅有CCC電氣安全證明（基於GB 4943.1）不被接受。

standards_or_laws: SM EN IEC 62368-1 (audio/video, IT and communications equipment — safety, mirrors IEC 62368-1)
SM EN 60950-1 (older IT equipment safety standard, being superseded by IEC 62368-1)
Law 235/2011 on technical regulations (Republic of Moldova)
220–230 V / 50 Hz mains; Type C / F (Schuko) plugs

summary.en: China requires CCC certification for electrical safety based on GB 4943.1 (equivalent to IEC 62368-1 with China-specific deviations) at 220 V / 50 Hz. China uses Type A and Type I sockets in addition to Type C; GB 4943.1 test conditions differ from the IEC 62368-1 basis used for SM standards. CCC electrical safety certificates are not recognised in Moldova.
summary.zh: 中国要求按GB 4943.1（与IEC 62368-1对应，含中国特定差异）取得CCC认证中的电气安全部分，适用220V/50Hz。中国除C型外还使用A型和I型插座；GB 4943.1测试条件与SM标准所依据的IEC 62368-1存在差异。CCC电气安全证书在摩尔多瓦不被认可。
summary.zht: 中國要求按GB 4943.1（與IEC 62368-1對應，含中國特定差異）取得CCC認證中的電氣安全部分，適用220V/50Hz。中國除C型外還使用A型和I型插座；GB 4943.1測試條件與SM標準所依據的IEC 62368-1存在差異。CCC電氣安全證書在摩爾多瓦不被認可。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 (IT equipment electrical safety, China — equivalent to IEC 62368-1 with deviations)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — electrical safety module
220 V / 50 Hz; Type A, C, I sockets (China)

gap.en: CCC electrical safety certification (GB 4943.1) is not recognised in Moldova. Because SM EN IEC 62368-1 mirrors the international IEC 62368-1 standard, EN IEC 62368-1 test reports from accredited laboratories may be reused as technical evidence for the Moldovan DS, reducing retesting costs. However, a fresh Moldovan DS citing SM EN IEC 62368-1 is still required. Power supplies and chargers destined for Moldova must be verified for Type C/F plug and 220–230 V / 50 Hz compatibility.
gap.zh: CCC电气安全认证（GB 4943.1）在摩尔多瓦不被认可。由于SM EN IEC 62368-1与国际IEC 62368-1标准对应，认可实验室出具的EN IEC 62368-1测试报告可作为摩尔多瓦DS的技术证明，有助于降低重新测试成本。但仍须出具引用SM EN IEC 62368-1的新摩尔多瓦DS。发往摩尔多瓦的电源适配器及充电器须核实C/F型插头及220–230V/50Hz兼容性。
gap.zht: CCC電氣安全認證（GB 4943.1）在摩爾多瓦不被認可。由於SM EN IEC 62368-1與國際IEC 62368-1標準對應，認可實驗室出具的EN IEC 62368-1測試報告可作為摩爾多瓦DS的技術證明，有助於降低重新測試成本。但仍須出具引用SM EN IEC 62368-1的新摩爾多瓦DS。發往摩爾多瓦的電源適配器及充電器須核實C/F型插頭及220–230V/50Hz相容性。

source.publisher: ATIC (Agency for Technical Supervision and Metrology, Republic of Moldova)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CCC electrical safety certification is not recognised in Moldova. A Moldovan DS referencing SM EN IEC 62368-1 is mandatory. EN IEC 62368-1 test reports from accredited labs can support the technical file and may reduce retesting costs, but the Moldovan conformity declaration must be issued separately. Verify Type C/F plug and 220–230 V / 50 Hz compatibility for all power-connected device variants.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] CCC电气安全认证在摩尔多瓦不被认可。引用SM EN IEC 62368-1的摩尔多瓦DS为强制要求。认可实验室出具的EN IEC 62368-1测试报告可支持技术文件并有助于降低重新测试成本，但摩尔多瓦符合性声明须单独出具。请核实所有有电源连接的设备型号的C/F型插头及220–230V/50Hz兼容性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] CCC電氣安全認證在摩爾多瓦不被認可。引用SM EN IEC 62368-1的摩爾多瓦DS為強制要求。認可實驗室出具的EN IEC 62368-1測試報告可支持技術文件並有助於降低重新測試成本，但摩爾多瓦符合性聲明須單獨出具。請核實所有有電源連接的裝置型號的C/F型插頭及220–230V/50Hz相容性。
